info.name: Microsoft Azure Managed Lustre client
info.description: Azure Managed Lustre provides a fully managed Lustre® file system, integrated with Blob storage, for use on demand. These operations create and manage Azure Managed Lustre file systems.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems

request.description: Returns all AML file systems the user has access to under a subscription.

response.name: A list of AML file systems. Note that entity references might replace complete file system objects, as described in http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata-json-format/v4.01/cs01/odata-json-format-v4.01-cs01.html#sec_EntityReference

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Storagecache Checkamlfssubnets

request.description: Check that subnets will be valid for AML file system create calls.

response.name: The subnets provided meet the requirements for AML file system create.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The subnets provided do not meet the requirements for AML file system create.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Storagecache Getrequiredamlfssubnetssize

request.description: Get the number of available IP addresses needed for the AML file system information provided.

response.name: The number of available IP addresses a subnet will need for an AML file system.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems Amlfilesystemname Archive

variable.description: (Required) Name for the AML file system. Allows alphanumerics, underscores, and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

request.description: Archive data from the AML file system.

response.name: AML file system has started the archive operation. Poll the AML file system's hsm.archiveStatus field to monitor the progress.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems Amlfilesystemname Cancelarchive

variable.description: (Required) Name for the AML file system. Allows alphanumerics, underscores, and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

request.description: Cancel archiving data from the AML file system.

response.name: AML file system has started the cancellation of the archive operation. Poll the AML file system's hsm.archiveStatus field to monitor the progress.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems Amlfilesystemname

variable.description: (Required) Name for the AML file system. Allows alphanumerics, underscores, and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

request.description: Schedules an AML file system for deletion.

response.name: AML file system deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Started the AML file system's transition to Deleted state. Poll the AML file system to monitor.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

description.content: Location URI to poll for result
URI to poll for the operation status

response.name: AML file system deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems Amlfilesystemname

variable.description: (Required) Name for the AML file system. Allows alphanumerics, underscores, and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

response.name: Returns the AML file system object corresponding to amlFilesystemName.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems Amlfilesystemname

variable.description: (Required) Name for the AML file system. Allows alphanumerics, underscores, and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

request.description: Create or update an AML file system.

response.name: The AML file system has been created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: AML file system creation has been initiated. Poll the AML file system's provisioningState property to monitor creation progress.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

description.content: URI to poll for the operation status

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems Amlfilesystemname

variable.description: (Required) Name for the AML file system. Allows alphanumerics, underscores, and hyphens. Start and end with alphanumeric.

request.description: Update an AML file system instance.

response.name: Updated the AML file system.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: AML file system update has been initiated. Poll the AML file system's provisioningState property to monitor update progress.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storagecache Amlfilesystems

request.description: Returns all AML file systems the user has access to under a resource group.

response.name: A list of AmlFilesystem objects. Note that entity references might replace complete AmlFilesystem objects, as described in http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata-json-format/v4.01/cs01/odata-json-format-v4.01-cs01.html#sec_EntityReference
